overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking along a dirt path through a rural camp settlement. The character passes by canvas tents, NPC villagers engaged in woodworking, and continues through sunflower fields with a distant stone tower visible under a bright blue sky.

events.description: wooden camp structure becomes clearly visible in the distance ahead

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the dirt path toward the distant camp settlement

entered.detail: muddy trail with deep wagon ruts and patches of grass
shallow water channel with tall brown reeds and wildflowers
dense evergreen forest lining the left side of the path
dense evergreen forest lining the right side of the path
rustic wooden hut with canvas roofing visible in the clearing ahead

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a winding dirt path through open wetlands, with a stream and tall reeds on the right and dense pine forests flanking both sides. The path leads toward a wooden camp structure visible in the distance under a bright midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: temporary camp settlement with canvas tents

events.description: enters the camp area passing the first canvas tent and wooden cart
briefly slows while passing villagers working before continuing forward

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking through the camp passing villagers engaged in woodworking and daily activities

notable_agents.action: villager sawing wood at a wooden workbench near a barrel
woman in dress walking near the tent entrance

entered.detail: large beige canvas tent with wooden support poles and guy ropes
rough-hewn wooden table with carpentry tools and wood planks
stone-ringed fire pit with burning embers in front of the tent
wooden wagon with canvas cover parked beside the path

segments.scene_description: Geralt enters a rustic camp settlement with canvas tents and wooden structures. He passes a villager sawing wood at a workbench on the right and a woman near a large tent on the left. The camp features a central fire pit and wooden carts scattered along the muddy path.

events.description: exits the camp into open fields with sunflowers lining the right side
child NPC runs past from right to left along the path

agents.ego_description: Geralt continuing along the path through sunflower fields toward the distant stone tower

notable_agents.action: child in red cap running past Geralt along the dirt path

entered.detail: dense field of blooming yellow sunflowers with green stalks
tall ruined stone tower visible on the horizon against the sky
rustic wooden fence marking the boundary of the field

segments.scene_description: Leaving the camp behind, Geralt walks through open countryside with vibrant sunflower fields on the right and a distant stone tower visible ahead. A child runs past along the path, and the terrain opens up to reveal wooden fences and expansive fields under the bright sun.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a secluded forest wetland into a bustling rural camp and finally out into expansive, sun-drenched fields. It begins with Geralt walking along a winding dirt path flanked by dense pine forests and tall reeds beside a stream, moving steadily toward a distant wooden structure. As the path leads forward, the environment shifts into a rustic camp settlement where the camera passes canvas tents, wooden carts, and villagers engaged in woodworking around a central fire pit. The scene then opens up as Geralt leaves the camp behind, moving from the muddy settlement into the vibrant yellow of sunflower fields. Finally, the terrain expands into the open countryside, passing wooden fences and a running child while a distant stone tower emerges against the bright midday sky.
